mapper.select: SELECT contact_email, company, partner_code, role, is_active FROM dbo.EXTERNAL_USER ORDER BY company, partner_code, contact_email
SELECT contact_email, company, partner_code, role, is_active FROM dbo.EXTERNAL_USER WHERE contact_email = #{contactEmail}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dbo.EXTERNAL_USER (contact_email, company, partner_code, role, is_active) VALUES (#{contactEmail}, #{company}, #{partnerCode}, #{role}, #{isActive})
mapper.update: UPDATE dbo.EXTERNAL_USER SET company = #{company}, partner_code = #{partnerCode}, role = #{role}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = SYSDATETIME() WHERE contact_email = #{contactEmail}
